codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds a persistent workspace admin shell under /admin using Next.js layouts, which satisfies the requirement for intact shell state across section transitions. Primary navigation is route-aware, and direct sub-routes were added. The code is well-tested with vitest and Playwright.

issues.description: The root /admin page duplicates the exact component structure of /admin/documents/page.tsx. Consider using next/navigation's redirect('/admin/documents') here instead of duplicating the UI, to ensure a single canonical URL for the Documents section.

summary: The workspace shell routing feature was successfully implemented. The shell persists correctly across section transitions via Next.js layout, and routing is covered by both unit tests and e2e Playwright tests. Passed review with one minor non-blocking issue regarding duplicated page content instead of a redirect.
